The one you get at the start and after ult
I mean, Ryker and Miryam aren't the same about that "filling"
Faros Ryker Miryam Goliath is the ultimate no hand space team
I only keep 1 of them in my hand, or at max: 2, I rarely keep 2 in hand
the more you use it, the less card you draw next turn, you know that right?
I keep 3 in hand usually unless I have a lot of draw, you only draw 5 cards at the start of the turn anyways
yes, it's written in the card
the more obsession turned into sacrament
the less card you draw next turn
Well I use Faros so draw isn't a problem anyways

and you actually dont need 3 of them to trigger effect

if you draw more it's automatically depleted

and I already have trouble with hand limit even though I only keep 1 of them in hand
remember, after awaken, Miryam adds more card to your hand, including her Rouse card and Divine Kingdome's descent

whenever you use their OP attack card, It will consume 5 charges
Combine that with sorel wheel and you get big damage

and stack several wheel to make her a champ
<@1263495189868056638> do you have something with which main and sub stats can be on each pizza slice?
you mean a sheet or like that?
yeah, image or a link to them
A slice of pizza can own any substats
each position of pizza can have up to 3 type on mainstats
the first three can have crit rate and dmg and the others silver, sigil, dr and realm
let take the top right pizza position for example
its mainstats iirc are: crit dmg, crit rate and madness charge
so when you farm pizza, it will give you randomly between those 3
and each mainstats only can have up to 3 positions
mean there won't be the 4th position of one mainstats
For example: Crit dmg position is 1 2 3, so crit dmg won't appear on 4 5 and 6 (I don't really remember the number, so I just name it randomly)
about subtats, there isn't any limitation to that
1 slice of pizza have 3 substats, and those 3 can be any stats
or can be the 3 same stats
I have 3 crit dmg substats on 1 pizza
well, resetting substats is the most painful thing in this game
yeah, still too early to go over that
btw what if you get undesired substats on a pizza do you have to replace the pizza (farm a new one)?
reset them or putting a new one with better substats
getting to rank 50 next week still quite some time left until substats
when you obtain a slice of pizza, it will give you 3 random substats on it
I saw those pens so that is used for reset substat?
those pen are used to lock substats
btw is there a way to get keeper levels fast?
clearing story and spending stamina are the only ways
yeah, energy stamina or whatever it was called in the game
if you have unlocked dream dive
remember to clear it at least once a day

content: I mean he isn't your main DPS
time to learn how to play the game
so don't expect stacking too much strenght too boost up his dmg, it does increase his dmg but you want a real DPS to deal that kind of dmg
I mean if you have good relics, then it shouldn't be a problem
is to prepare at least 20% base crit
let say, his SR wheel will give him 14% after you kill 3 enemies using his attack
his SSR wheel give you 3% per relic you own (this won't be shown in his stats.)
rough calculation, you will need about 5~8 relics, that will be 15~24%, 14% from SR wheel, 15~20% pizza for decent crit.
the rest is up to relic you have

well technically i can reach almost 100%
base crit 20%
SR wheel 14%
pizza 15%
SSR , usually you can get around 6 relics, usually more because he provides like 2 per exploration so thats around 18%
Jenkins rouse adds 25%
there is no base crit tho
most of your basic crit comes from pizza
yep, that thing come from pizza
he does not have pizza equipped
this ryker is still lvl 40 lol
so he does have base as 9
most of them have base as 5 iirc
i think he has a base of 10%
It will reconsider to change his pizza to crit dmg instead

My 24 team is 24, Ryker, Ramona and Doll
mine is 24, Lily Ryker and Alva
emergency revive makes you invincible for a full turn
Lily is there to bear the Polar night
Alva is OP when you can discard all the bad things in your hand
and she deals decent amount of dmg
if you roll rng can use deathresist to block single big hits and emergency revive to block a triplehit
you can retry stage and refund emergency revives used
what retry refunds the emergency units?
so you can gamble with 30% DR or something
directly retrying from menu also gives you the exact same start
if you exit and re-enter you can change the 0cost dice roll result
the challenge stage doesnt cost anything but the 120stamina stage will waste 3stamina
if you have time you can just exit and re-enter to ensure borrowed 24 exalt every turn including turn 1
then when you have a good start but make a mistake, you can click retry from menu to repeat the starting play

wait wtf i just realized, upgrading ryker's cape literally gives u +2 dice roll power
the cape original effect was: the result won't be the lowest
the cap advance effect: final result +1
if it rolls 1, it will be 2, and since this is the final result, it will increase to 3
I don't rmb if you upgrade the cape it still keeps the original effect or not, but yeah, it did keeps it will be minimum of 3
this game's translation is a mess
I remember rolling 2's with the upgraded cape so I think the effect is mistranslated
worse than project moon did lol
so if you rolled 1, it would be 2
upgrading that cape gives you extra 5% crit
so I usually ignore that thing
the best one to upgrade is the thing that increases your crit dmg
i thought it also upgrades the dice roll by 2 😔
the only real relic that does anything is that cape anyway
the rest of the relic hardly improves ur anything
the one I mentioned literally increased my crit dmg up to 60% in my run on chapter 7
I don't rmb if it went over that number but yeah, it had at least 60% increased.
dont u need like to trigger it by 15x to reach the potential?
trigger what, just use key and ultimate
i use tiny wish with him
and you get perma power instead of tempt power
one of them give you a dice when you use key
if you count his key, then it will be 4 dices
but yeah, not recommend using that damn key
I only use tiny wish on Blue team
since that team consumes too much mana
are crit rate/damage buffs global? or do they affect just the hero that usees them
if relic then yes but pizza are for each individual
Most buffs are global, but if you dont see it under your team's buff bar, then it isn't for the team

I think the effect will be written clearly when applied

like on Pizza it will write as: "THE WIELDER will have crit rate increased by 30%" or sth
if it's written like that, I think the buff will only affect 1 individual
